Dynamic Trex Target Lab

Upload a JPG/PNG or provide an image URL, let the local Node service generate a dedicated AR.js NFT target, then open the viewer to verify the image can trigger the fixed Trex model.

Or upload a local JPG/PNG file.

Verification notes
  • POC keeps the AR content fixed to the Trex model. Only the target image changes.
  • Best target images have strong corners, texture, and contrast.
  • If you print the image, avoid glare, blur, and tight crops.

Built-in sample URL:

Static Trex sanity check: open static viewer
